summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of BUYWISE Wholesale Offer Calculator with new Repair Estimator feature. All requested features tested and working correctly: tab navigation, quick sqft estimate, rehab levels, advanced itemized repairs, sync to calculator, dark mode toggle, and reference table.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Tab navigation between Calculator and Repair Estimator works. Quick Estimate calculation verified (1343 sqft × Medium = $57,078). All 4 rehab levels (Light/Medium/Heavy/Ultra) work with visual indicators. Advanced Itemized Repairs expandable section with checkboxes works. Sync to Calculator transfers repair cost correctly. Dark/Light mode toggle works on both tabs. Reference table shows correct values. Save Deal, Reset, Export PDF, Copy buttons all functional.

verified_features.tab_navigation: ✅ Calculator and Repair Estimator tabs work correctly
verified_features.advanced_itemized_repairs: ✅ Expandable section with checkboxes, quantity inputs for multi-item repairs
verified_features.sync_to_calculator: ✅ Transfers repair cost ($57,078) to Calculator tab and shows toast notification
verified_features.dark_mode_toggle: ✅ Works on both Calculator and Repair Estimator tabs

calculator_features.advanced_options: ✅ ARV Rule slider (60-85%) and Negotiation Discount input work

verified_features.hamburger_menu_removed: ✅ No hamburger menu or sidebar present
